title: Cyra
description: A Minecraft mod that reveals the secrets of the ocean!
body:
# BIG REWORK
This mod is beeing reworked at the moment, updates will have a big delay until the next version will release!!

Cyra!
In this mod, you are required to explore the depths of the ocean and discover its secrets!
## WARNING :
  This mod for now is not compatible with shaders and it will crash if you try!
  This mod is still in ALPHA, please report any bugs or crashes to the issue area!
  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FcK8WqkevgQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **GETING STARTED**
To enter this dimension you will need a new kind of portal made out of the Core of The Sea and surround it by certain blocks in a circle manner!

### RECOMENDED MOD TO PLAY WITH
  JEI - for recipes


Example:
![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81812c60d386cbf403643b2cddc952a298543dfd.png)

But the portal is very flexible with its choice of blocks!
The list of every block you can use (and even in combinations)!
![Blocks for portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d5582a39f6b103b86a4786561c9bfd18b663ee0.png)

This dimension requires a gadget to enter and explore called a Depth Charm that has 3 tiers!

In this mod you have access to a big arsenal of weapons (Melee, Throwing and Magic) and armour!
![Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b166ab075b8b8446f65c8ab1052c3ead3dfd1d1.png)


![Weapons And Gadgets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0579fc75a60935cadbc7df6b811a819e4c4169.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### CHEAT SHEAT AREA 
  So if you're here it means that you're stuck in progression, well that's why this part exists

  Charms:
-     Tier 1: 300 - 200 y level (Where you find Sea Crystal)
-     Tier 2: 200 - 100 y level (Where you find Normal Pyrite)
-     Tier 3: 100 - 0   y level and Void Biome exploration (Where you find more pyrite and ancient Pyrite only in the void)

    Void: Be careful of the monsters that live down there and when mining void blocks try to
    be alert for a specific sound that has a random chance to occur. When you hear that don't 
    mine any blocks for 4-5 seconds!

    Void exploration guide :
-       Full Sea Crystal Armour for infinite Dolphins grace !
-       Sea Lantern for vision (Night vision doesn't work down there hehe)!
-       Buff Flask And Healing flask!

  Skeleton Leader attacks:
  - He makes a sound and spawns particles where he will teleport and shoot an arrow from
 
   
  Old Lord :
  - Combo attack can be parried by Swords, Axes, and Scythes (Hoe) made of Pyrite!
  - Fist levitation attack can be dodged with Pyrite Bulwark  

    

    

</details>
